base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of on_screen_text — a ui (dialog) from 1988 super mario bros 3. On-screen dialog text overlays — 'WORLD 1', 'COURSE 1-1', 'TIME UP'. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
